title: calamagrostis × maritima
intro: Calamagrostis × maritima, also known as purple meadow-grass, is a hybrid plant species of grass that combines the characteristics of Calamagrostis arundinacea and Calamagrostis epigejos. This plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis × maritima include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
